category.scope_note: Electric vehicle conductive charging equipment comparison.

title.en: China-to-Indonesia EV Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国电动汽车充电桩进入印度尼西亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國電動汽車充電樁進入印尼：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China EV charger documentation against Indonesia SNI standards, ESDM public charging-station rules, PLN interconnection expectations, connector compatibility, TKDN local-content policy, and safety / EMC expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国电动汽车充电桩文件与印度尼西亚 SNI 标准、ESDM 公共充电站规则、PLN 接入要求、连接器兼容性、TKDN 本地含量政策及安全/EMC要求的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國電動汽車充電樁文件與印尼 SNI 標準、ESDM 公共充電站規則、PLN 接入要求、連接器相容性、TKDN 本地含量政策及安全/EMC要求的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SNI scope determination, ESDM licensing assessment, PLN grid-connection approval, TKDN determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, operators, and installers should verify current Indonesian SNI, ESDM, PLN, TKDN, electrical-installation, radio, and customs requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SNI适用范围裁定、ESDM许可评审、PLN并网批准、TKDN判定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、运营方和安装方在出货或安装前，应与合格专业人士核实现行印度尼西亚SNI、ESDM、PLN、TKDN、电气安装、无线电及海关要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SNI適用範圍裁定、ESDM許可評審、PLN併網批准、TKDN判定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、營運方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行印尼SNI、ESDM、PLN、TKDN、電氣安裝、無線電及海關要求。

answer_first.en: For China-made EV chargers entering Indonesia, the biggest practical gaps are not a confirmed blanket whole-unit SNI certificate, but SNI/IEC technical alignment, ESDM SPKLU business and operation rules, PLN utility coordination, GB/T-to-IEC connector redesign, TKDN local-content expectations for public procurement or incentive-linked projects, and safety / EMC evidence. Whole-unit mandatory certification should be verified with BSN and the responsible Indonesian authorities for the exact model and use case.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造充电桩进入印度尼西亚时，主要实际差距并非已确认的整机统一强制SNI证书，而是SNI/IEC技术对应、ESDM的SPKLU经营与运营规则、PLN电网协调、GB/T到IEC连接器重新设计、公共采购或激励项目中的TKDN本地含量要求，以及安全/EMC证据。具体型号和用途是否需要整机强制认证，应向BSN及印度尼西亚主管机关核实。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造充電樁進入印尼時，主要實際差距並非已確認的整機統一強制SNI證書，而是SNI/IEC技術對應、ESDM的SPKLU經營與營運規則、PLN電網協調、GB/T到IEC連接器重新設計、公共採購或激勵項目中的TKDN本地含量要求，以及安全/EMC證據。具體型號和用途是否需要整機強制認證，應向BSN及印尼主管機關核實。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, government gazette, utility, local-content authority, conformity assessment body, customs authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
